note: REFERENCES + CONTENT HASHES ONLY — no card lists, card IDs, or card names (CC-1/CC-2, ESP-3). The card list is Competition Data and lives only in the local, git-ignored deck file. The harness resolves a deck_id to actual cards from that file at runtime; this committed file carries only the hash, so silent deck drift is detectable without redistributing Pokémon Elements.

decks.source_ref: local, git-ignored: config.deck_file (Competition Data — never committed)
